goal: Investigate why GSD dropped Claude marketplace plugin support between changelog entry 2026-01-06 ('Claude Code marketplace plugin support') and 1.35.0 source tree (manifest no longer present). Unknown abandonment reason; superpowers successfully ships on marketplace so the mechanism works. Possible causes: (a) review rejected by Anthropic, (b) submission process friction, (c) plugin conflicts with existing install.js copy-install, (d) maintenance burden of dual-distribution, (e) marketplace policy change. Action: (1) git log + git show on the GSD repo to find the add + remove commits, (2) read commit messages + any linked issues, (3) check if the removed plugin.json + marketplace.json still exist in history, (4) document findings in .planning/notes/2026-04-22-gsd-marketplace-abandonment.md. If the cause is (a) or (e), we need to know before attempting the same path. If (b)-(d), we can proceed differently.
